---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the website
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is (e.g., "The 'Join Discord' button on the homepage goes to a 404 page").

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Desktop/Mobile Context (please complete the following information):**
 - Device/OS: [e.g. iPhone 13, Windows 10]
 - Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here, or drop by our [Discord Server](https://discord.studygrc.org) to discuss it!
